data.body: Error messages from hook dispatchers (e.g. pre-bash.sh) display raw ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} instead of the resolved path. Example: 'Error: PreToolUse:Bash hook error: [${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/run-hook.sh ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/dispatchers/pre-bash.sh]: BLOCKED'. The variable should be expanded before being included in user-visible output.
